_publications._publicationTitle: Performance Evaluation of SpliceAI for the Prediction of Splicing of

_contextSnippet: Among the 285 unique variants, 84.2% were concordant between SpliceAI and MES/SSF. The calculated positive percent agreement (PPA), negative percent agreement (NPA), and kappa value were 68.4%...
details: 84.2% concordance rate with MES/SSF, with PPA of 68.4% (95% CI, 58.6–76.7), NPA of 92.5% (95% CI, 87.8–95.5), and kappa value of 0.64 (95% CI, 0.54–0.73)
